factual_background.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC add to lease
factual_background.paragraph: On 8/5/2024, the document "HACC add to lease" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Health, Housing &Human ServicesCLACKAMAS COUNTY Housing Authority of Clackamas County EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY LEASE AMENDMENT — RENT ADJUSTMENT AND/OR ADD OR REMOVE TENANTS...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC add to lease.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC phase2 2024
factual_background.paragraph: On September 19, 2024, the document "HACC phase2 2024" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "HAND DELIVERED O CERTIFIED MAIL Hillside Park Apartments Phase II General Information Notice September 19, 2024 Dear Resident: The Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC)...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC phase2 2024.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC 90 day notice 2
factual_background.paragraph: On December 23, 2025, the document "HACC 90 day notice 2" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "Health,Housing & Human Servi Executive Director, Shannon Callahan 30 Day Lease Termination Notice without Cause December 23, 2025 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Ave Milwaukie, OR...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice 2.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC 90 day notice
factual_background.paragraph: On December 23, 2025, the document "HACC 90 day notice" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "Health, Housing & Human Services Executive Director, Shannan Callahan 90 Day Lease Termination Notice without Cause December 23, 2025 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Ave Milwaukie, OR...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC 90 day notice 3
factual_background.paragraph: On December 31, 2025, the document "HACC 90 day notice 3" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "NOTICE OF ELIGIBILITY AND 90 DAY NOTICE RESIDENTIAL TENANT TO BE DISPLACED O HAND DELIVERED C] CERTIFIED MAIL December 31, 2025 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice 3.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC vawa violation
factual_background.paragraph: On 1/1/2026, the document "HACC vawa violation" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Shannon Callahan, Executive Director Housing Authority of Clackamas County Health, Housing & Human Services EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY LEASE AMENDMENT — RENT ADJUSTMENT AND/OR ADD...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC vawa violation.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC Jan 2026 blossom
factual_background.paragraph: On 01/08/2026, the document "HACC Jan 2026 blossom" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Health, Housing : &HumanservicesSS Housing Authority of Clackamas County — APPR TING Jane Cortez 10043 SE 324 Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 IMPORTANT: ACTION REQUIRED Dear Jane...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC Jan 2026 blossom.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Protected-status or VAWA issue: HACC first amendment
factual_background.paragraph: On February 4, 2026, the document "HACC first amendment" reflects a protected-status or VAWA-related issue stating: "Health,Housing &Human Services Februa ry 4, 2026 Executive Director, Shannon Callahan Jane Cortez and Benjamin Barber 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 30 Day for Cause...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC first amendment.pdf.

factual_background.event_label: Financial verification request: HACC financial requests
factual_background.paragraph: On February 9, 2026, the document "HACC financial requests" reflects a financial verification request stating: "Health, Housing &Humanservices.& Housing Authority of Clackamas County LSIURL, HOUGING OPPORTUNITY February 9, 2026 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 RE:...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC financial requests.pdf.

Between February 09, 2026 and February 25, 2026, the email thread "Additional Information Needed" included 3 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us> and benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-additional-info-import/email_import_manifest.json.

Housing Authority of Clackamas County . Jane Cortez February 26, 2026 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 Dear Jane Cortez and all other,...". Between February 26, 2026 and March 11, 2026, the email thread "Additional Information Needed" included 5 captured messages involving benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>, "Tilton, Kati" <ktilton@clackamas.us>, "Ferron, Ashley" <AFerron@clackamas.us>, charity@magikcorp.com, "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us>. factual_background.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC inspection
factual_background.paragraph: On March 17, 2026, the document "HACC inspection" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Health, Housing L&Human Services ial psnnsn Executive Ojrector, Shannon Callahan March 17, 2026 NOTICE TO RESIDENTS HUD NSPIRE INSPECTION Dear Residents, The U.S. Department of...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC inspection.pdf.

Between March 17, 2026 and March 21, 2026, the email thread "HCV Orientation" included 5 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us> and benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-ktilton-orientation-import/email_import_manifest.json.

counts.title: Potential Claim Theme: Deficient Notice and Adverse Housing Action
counts.intro: These facts support a draft theory that HACC issued or escalated adverse housing actions through notices and displacement-related communications.
element_prompts: Identify the specific notice requirements imposed by the lease, program rules, ORS chapter 90, HUD guidance, or relocation rules.
State how the notices were deficient, inconsistent, untimely, or misleading.
Explain the concrete housing harm threatened or imposed by the adverse action.

entries.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC phase2 2024
entries.paragraph: On September 19, 2024, the document "HACC phase2 2024" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "HAND DELIVERED O CERTIFIED MAIL Hillside Park Apartments Phase II General Information Notice September 19, 2024 Dear Resident: The Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC)...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC phase2 2024.pdf.

entries.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC 90 day notice 2
entries.paragraph: On December 23, 2025, the document "HACC 90 day notice 2" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "Health,Housing & Human Servi Executive Director, Shannon Callahan 30 Day Lease Termination Notice without Cause December 23, 2025 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Ave Milwaukie, OR...". entries.event_label: Notice or adverse action: HACC 90 day notice
entries.paragraph: On December 23, 2025, the document "HACC 90 day notice" reflects a notice or adverse action stating: "Health, Housing & Human Services Executive Director, Shannan Callahan 90 Day Lease Termination Notice without Cause December 23, 2025 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Ave Milwaukie, OR...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice.pdf.

paragraphs: On September 19, 2024, HACC generated or used the document "HACC phase2 2024" in connection with a notice or adverse housing action. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC phase2 2024.pdf [Exhibit B].

On December 23, 2025, HACC generated or used the document "HACC 90 day notice 2" in connection with a notice or adverse housing action. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice 2.pdf [Exhibit C].

On December 23, 2025, HACC generated or used the document "HACC 90 day notice" in connection with a notice or adverse housing action. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC 90 day notice.pdf [Exhibit D].

counts.title: Potential Claim Theme: Lease, Occupancy, and Displacement Conduct
counts.intro: These facts support a draft theory centered on lease amendments, occupancy changes, inspections, and relocation-related housing conditions.
element_prompts: Identify the lease, occupancy, inspection, transfer, or displacement obligation at issue.
State how HACC's conduct departed from that obligation or from ordinary housing process requirements.
Explain the resulting loss of housing stability, access, or tenancy rights.

entries.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC add to lease
entries.paragraph: On 8/5/2024, the document "HACC add to lease" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Health, Housing &Human ServicesCLACKAMAS COUNTY Housing Authority of Clackamas County EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY LEASE AMENDMENT — RENT ADJUSTMENT AND/OR ADD OR REMOVE TENANTS...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC add to lease.pdf.

entries.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC vawa violation
entries.paragraph: On 1/1/2026, the document "HACC vawa violation" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Shannon Callahan, Executive Director Housing Authority of Clackamas County Health, Housing & Human Services EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY LEASE AMENDMENT — RENT ADJUSTMENT AND/OR ADD...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC vawa violation.pdf.

entries.event_label: Lease or occupancy event: HACC Jan 2026 blossom
entries.paragraph: On 01/08/2026, the document "HACC Jan 2026 blossom" reflects a lease or occupancy event stating: "Health, Housing : &HumanservicesSS Housing Authority of Clackamas County — APPR TING Jane Cortez 10043 SE 324 Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 IMPORTANT: ACTION REQUIRED Dear Jane...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC Jan 2026 blossom.pdf.

paragraphs: On 8/5/2024, HACC generated or used the document "HACC add to lease" in connection with a lease, occupancy, inspection, or displacement-related housing event. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC add to lease.pdf [Exhibit A].

On 1/1/2026, HACC generated or used the document "HACC vawa violation" in connection with a lease, occupancy, inspection, or displacement-related housing event. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC vawa violation.pdf [Exhibit F].

On 01/08/2026, HACC generated or used the document "HACC Jan 2026 blossom" in connection with a lease, occupancy, inspection, or displacement-related housing event. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC Jan 2026 blossom.pdf [Exhibit G].

counts.title: Potential Claim Theme: Documentation Demands and Intake Barriers
counts.intro: These facts support a draft theory that repeated documentation demands and related email exchanges created material barriers in the housing process.
element_prompts: Describe the specific documentation demands or intake conditions imposed on plaintiff.
State why those demands were unreasonable, inconsistently applied, retaliatory, discriminatory, or otherwise improper.
Explain how the demands delayed, burdened, or obstructed housing access or retention.

entries.event_label: Financial verification request: HACC financial requests
entries.paragraph: On February 9, 2026, the document "HACC financial requests" reflects a financial verification request stating: "Health, Housing &Humanservices.& Housing Authority of Clackamas County LSIURL, HOUGING OPPORTUNITY February 9, 2026 Jane Cortez 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 RE:...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC financial requests.pdf.

Between February 09, 2026 and March 11, 2026, the email thread "Additional Information Needed" included 8 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us>, benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>, "Tilton, Kati" <ktilton@clackamas.us>, "Ferron, Ashley" <AFerron@clackamas.us>, charity@magikcorp.com. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-additional-info-import/email_import_manifest.json.

paragraphs: On February 9, 2026, HACC generated or used the document "HACC financial requests" in connection with a documentation or financial verification demand. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC financial requests.pdf [Exhibit I].

Between February 09, 2026 and March 11, 2026, the email thread "Additional Information Needed" included 8 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us>, benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>, "Tilton, Kati" <ktilton@clackamas.us>, "Ferron, Ashley" <AFerron@clackamas.us>, charity@magikcorp.com. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-additional-info-import/email_import_manifest.json [Exhibit J].

counts.title: Potential Claim Theme: Protected Status and VAWA-Related Conduct
counts.intro: These facts support a draft theory that protected-status and VAWA-related issues were implicated in later housing actions.
element_prompts: Identify the protected status, VAWA protection, or related legal protection implicated by the facts.
Connect the protected status facts to the challenged notice, lease action, or housing decision.
State the resulting discriminatory, retaliatory, or procedurally unlawful harm.

entries.event_label: Protected-status or VAWA issue: HACC first amendment
entries.paragraph: On February 4, 2026, the document "HACC first amendment" reflects a protected-status or VAWA-related issue stating: "Health,Housing &Human Services Februa ry 4, 2026 Executive Director, Shannon Callahan Jane Cortez and Benjamin Barber 10043 SE 32nd Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 30 Day for Cause...". Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC first amendment.pdf.

paragraphs: On February 4, 2026, HACC generated or used the document "HACC first amendment" in connection with a protected-status or VAWA-related housing issue. Source: evidence/paper documents/HACC first amendment.pdf [Exhibit H].

counts.title: Potential Claim Theme: Orientation and Compliance Delays
counts.intro: These facts support a draft theory that orientation and compliance requirements became a distinct procedural track affecting housing progression.
element_prompts: Identify the orientation or compliance requirement and the source of that requirement.
Explain how the timing or administration of the requirement affected plaintiff's housing position.
State the concrete delay, denial, or prejudice caused by that process.

entries.paragraph: Between March 17, 2026 and March 21, 2026, the email thread "HCV Orientation" included 5 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us> and benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-ktilton-orientation-import/email_import_manifest.json.

paragraphs: Between March 17, 2026 and March 21, 2026, the email thread "HCV Orientation" included 5 captured messages involving "Tilton, Kati" <KTilton@clackamas.us> and benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>. Source: evidence/email_imports/starworks5-ktilton-orientation-import/email_import_manifest.json [Exhibit M].
